The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis and cancer. This family is part of the larger group of ferns, known as the Pteridophyta or vascular cryptogams. The genus Elaphoglossum is a group of small to medium-sized, terrestrial ferns with unique characteristics. Elaphoglossum xanthoneuron is classified within this genus due to its shared morphological features and genetic relationships with other Elaphoglossum species. Further classification of Elaphoglossum xanthoneuron involves its placement within the order Polypodiales.
